subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn! Be thou firm and steadfast as a mountain of iron in the Covenant of the Manifest Beauty, and be as a lion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین چون کوه آهنین در پیمان جمال مبین رزین و رصین باش و چون غضنفر
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
